# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Project Overview
Beudox HR is a comprehensive Human Resources Management System built as a single-page application (SPA) using React and TypeScript. It provides organizations with tools to manage the complete employee lifecycle, from onboarding to offboarding, including payroll, evaluations, leave management, and project tracking.

## Architecture & Technology Stack

### Frontend Architecture
- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript for type safety
- **Build System**: Vite for fast development and optimized production builds
- **Routing**: React Router v6 with protected routes and role-based access control
- **State Management**: 
  - React Query (@tanstack/react-query) for server state management and caching
  - React hooks for local component state
- **UI Components**: shadcn/ui built on Radix UI primitives for accessible, customizable components
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens and CSS variables
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod schema validation

### Backend & Data
- **Backend-as-a-Service**: Supabase providing:
  - PostgreSQL database with real-time capabilities
  - Authentication (email/password, magic links, invites)
  - Row Level Security (RLS) policies
  - Edge Functions for server-side logic
  - File storage for avatars and documents
- **Database Schema**: Complex relational schema with 27+ migration files handling:
  - Employee management (profiles, roles, departments)
  - Project and client relationships
  - Payroll calculations and records
  - Leave tracking and balances
  - Evaluation systems (quarterly and daily)
  - Invoice generation and management

### Key Design Patterns
- **Component Composition**: Extensive use of compound components and render props
- **Custom Hooks**: Business logic abstracted into reusable hooks (useAuth, useSort, etc.)
- **Provider Pattern**: Context providers for global state (AuthProvider, QueryClientProvider)
- **Protected Routes**: Route-level access control with role checking
- **Optimistic Updates**: React Query mutations with optimistic UI updates

## Core Features & Implementation

### Authentication & Authorization
- **Multi-tenant**: Company-scoped data with proper isolation
- **Role-based Access**: Hierarchical permissions (employee, team_lead, hr_manager, ceo)
- **Invite System**: Email-based employee invitations with password setup
- **Session Management**: Automatic token refresh and session persistence

### Employee Management
- **Profile System**: Comprehensive employee profiles with avatar upload
- **Search & Filtering**: Advanced employee search with role and department filters
- **Bulk Operations**: Mass employee management capabilities

### Evaluation System
- **Dual Evaluation Types**:
  - Quarterly evaluations: Formal performance reviews with recommendations
  - Daily evaluations: Peer feedback and quick check-ins
- **Visibility Rules**: Role-based access to evaluation data
- **Timeline View**: Chronological evaluation history with filtering

### Payroll & Finance
- **Automated Calculations**: Complex payroll logic with OT, bonuses, deductions
- **Multi-currency Support**: PKR-focused with extensible currency handling
- **Financial Reporting**: 6-month trend analysis with interactive charts
- **PDF Generation**: Server-side invoice and payslip generation using PDF libraries

### Project Management
- **Dual Project Views**: Legacy and v2 project interfaces
- **Team Assignment**: Dynamic team management with role assignments
- **Task Tracking**: Project task management with status updates
- **Client Integration**: Project-client relationships with billing

### Leave Management
- **Leave Types**: Configurable leave categories with balance tracking
- **Approval Workflows**: Multi-level approval processes
- **Calendar Integration**: Leave calendar with conflict detection
- **Balance Calculations**: Automatic leave balance updates

## Development Workflow

### Code Organization
- **Feature-based Structure**: Components organized by feature domains
- **Utility Libraries**: Shared utilities in `/lib` (date formatting, role access, etc.)
- **Type Safety**: Comprehensive TypeScript usage with generated Supabase types
- **Testing Strategy**: Unit tests with Vitest, E2E with Playwright

### Data Flow
- **API Layer**: Supabase client with typed queries
- **Caching Strategy**: React Query for efficient data fetching and caching
- **Real-time Updates**: Supabase subscriptions for live data synchronization
- **Error Handling**: Comprehensive error boundaries and user feedback

### Performance Considerations
- **Code Splitting**: Route-based code splitting for optimized bundle sizes
- **Image Optimization**: Lazy loading and responsive images
- **Query Optimization**: Efficient database queries with proper indexing
- **Bundle Analysis**: Vite build analysis for performance monitoring

## Key Files & Entry Points

### Application Entry
- `src/main.tsx`: React root rendering
- `src/App.tsx`: Main application component with routing
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Next.js-style page router (legacy)

### Core Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main application layout
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Navigation sidebar
- `src/components/ui/`: shadcn/ui component library

### Business Logic
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication state management
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based permission checking
- `src/lib/client-activity.ts`: Activity logging and categorization
- `src/integrations/supabase/`: Database client and type definitions

### Configuration
- `vite.config.ts`: Build configuration
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Styling configuration
- `supabase/config.toml`: Backend configuration

## Database Schema Highlights

### Core Entities
- **employees**: User profiles with role and department relationships
- **companies**: Multi-tenant company isolation
- **projects**: Project management with team assignments
- **evaluations**: Performance evaluation system
- **payroll_records**: Payroll calculation and history
- **leave_requests**: Leave management system
- **invoices**: Client billing and invoicing

### Relationships
- Employees belong to companies and departments
- Projects have many-to-many team member relationships
- Evaluations link employees with reviewers and reviewees
- Payroll records connect to employees with detailed breakdowns

## Deployment & DevOps

### Build Process
- **Development**: Hot reload with Vite dev server
- **Production**: Optimized build with code splitting and minification
- **Testing**: Automated test suite with CI/CD integration

### Environment Management
- **Environment Variables**: Supabase configuration via .env files
- **Build Variants**: Development and production build modes
- **Asset Management**: Static asset optimization and CDN deployment

This technical context provides the foundation for understanding the Beudox HR codebase architecture, implementation patterns, and development practices.
